tooltip.monsterexpansion.bedrock_core.de: A dense, ancient core formed under unimaginable pressure. It carries the unyielding strength of the earth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.deepfreeze_glan: A subzero organ harvested from the Leivekilth. It secretes an essence cold enough to freeze steel solid.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.duskrend.descri: Forged from the dusk's claw, it moves faster than its shadow.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.duskrend.flavor: The dusk hunts with silent grace.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.flash_bundle.de: A compact cluster of flash arrows, thrown by Kobeko who can’t be bothered with bows.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.hoarfrost_shard: A crystalline shard infused with biting hoarfrost dropped from the Leivekilth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.horn_of_shatter: The great horn of resonant power.
The air trembles at its call.
Fire a distortion orb that echoes outward.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.kobeko_armor.de: An armor piece for the Kobeko.
Allows you to teleport your tamed Kobeko to you from anywhere!
tooltip.monsterexpansion.leivekilth_armo: +1.8% Damage Reduction for each worn piece.
An armor piece crafted from the Leivekilth's materials
You gain Leivekilth’s frost control; you have permanent frostwalker.
You gain Leivekilth’s ice armor; chance of bursting ice, damaging whatever attacked you.
A dense fragment of scale dropped from the Leivekilth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.leivekilth_kobe: An armor piece crafted with Leivekilth's materials for the Kobeko.
Kobeko stagger's shatter ice, damaging those near.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.leivekilth_rime: A frost-laced pelt shed from the Leivekilth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.leivekilth_tail: Leivekilth's tail piece dropped by severing the beast's tail from its body.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.leivekilth_tusk: A massive, frozen tusk torn from the Leivekilth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.monster_hardbon: A sturdy piece of bone dropped by a Large Monster.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_armor.da: +1.2% Damage Reduction for each worn piece.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_armor.de: An armor piece crafted from the Rakoth's materials
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_armor.mo: You gain Rakoth’s unyielding mass; sprinting builds momentum to deflect projectiles.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_armor.st: You gain Rakoth’s steadfastness; you can step over full blocks.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_carapace: A hardened segment of exoskeleton dropped by the Rakoth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_horn.des: A jagged horn broken from the Rakoth's crown.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_kobeko_a: Kobeko's regular attacks become area of effect.
An armor piece crafted with Rakoth's materials for the Kobeko.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_tail.des: Rakoth's tail piece dropped by severing the beast's tail from its body.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rakoth_underpla: A dense, scarred armor plate torn from the Rakoth’s underside.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_armor.clo: You gain Rhyza’s cloaking; you become invisible on low hp.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_armor.dam: +0.6% Damage Reduction for each worn piece.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_armor.daz: You gain Rhyza’s dazzle resistance; you are immune to blinding light.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_armor.des: An armor piece crafted from the Rhyza's materials.
A hardened segment of exoskeleton dropped by the Rhyza.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_claw.desc: A razor-sharp claw dropped from the Rhyza.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_fur.descr: A thick piece of fur dropped from the Rhyza.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_gleam_cor: A radiant core pulsing with blinding light, dropped by the Rhyza.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_kobeko_ar: An armor piece crafted with Rhyza's materials for the Kobeko.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_scale.des: A hard shard of scale dropped by the Rhyza.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rhyza_tail.desc: Rhyza's tail piece dropped by severing the beast's tail from its body.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rimescourge.des: A mace that pounds with glacial wrath.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rimescourge.eff: Applies Frostvein, layering chill that slows and numbs foes.
Unleash a freezing shockwave of ice spikes.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.rimescourge.fla: You feel the air get colder around you...
tooltip.monsterexpansion.sedimentary_sca: A layered, stone-hard shell fragment broken from the Rakoth.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.serrated_sharpc: A jagged claw from Rhyza, edged with unnatural precision and highly prized.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_armor.d: +1.2% Damage Reduction for each worn piece.
An armor piece crafted from the Skrythe's materials.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_armor.m: You gain Skrythe’s might; resistance to fall damage, falls erupt into shockwaves.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_armor.r: You gain Skrythe’s resilience; increased knockback resistance.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_armorpl: A dense fragment of scale dropped from the Skrythe.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_fang.de: A razor-sharp fang broken from the Skrythe's jaw.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_frill.d: A vibrant blue frill dropped from the Skrythe.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_kobeko_: An armor piece crafted with Skrythe's materials for the Kobeko.
Kobeko becomes resistant to fall damage.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_tail.de: Skrythe's tail piece dropped by severing the beast's tail from its body.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.skrythe_wing_me: A torn stretch of wing membrane dropped from the Skrythe.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.spireshellbulwa: Charge. Impact deals damage and inflicts Bleeding.
A spiked heavy shield forged from Rakoth plating.
Nothing is getting past you now.
You're able to block attacks which would disable or ignore shields. (Large monsters excluded)
tooltip.monsterexpansion.taunt_shield.de: A battered Kobeko shield, more noise than metal, perfect for drawing attention.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.vigor_belt.desc: A sturdy belt rigged to carry potions, letting a Kobeko mend itself or its master on the fly.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.vocal_resonance: A magical fragment of Skrythe’s throat, humming with the wyvern’s lingering roar.
tooltip.monsterexpansion.whistlewind_hor: A Skrythe-alloy horn that releases a burst of wind, bolstering its Kobeko wielder.
